info.name: ECOS Ingestion Service
info.description:
Full-coverage test suite for the ECOS Data Ingestion Service.

Run folders in order:
1. Health Check
2. Stations
3. Readings
4. Cleanup

The 'Create Station (Valid)' request sets {{stationId}} used by downstream tests.
The 'Create Reading (Valid)' request sets {{readingId}}.

item.name: Create Station (400 — latitude out of range high)
Create Station (400 — latitude out of range low)
Create Station (400 — longitude out of range high)
Create Station (400 — longitude out of range low)

exec: pm.test('Created station is present in list', () => {

item.name: Update Station (Valid — restore to active with name change)
Update Station (Valid — all valid statuses: inactive)

exec: pm.test('Error is invalid request body', () => pm.expect(pm.response.json().error).to.eql('invalid request body'));

item.name: Create Reading (400 — latitude out of range)
Create Reading (400 — longitude out of range)

exec: pm.test('Error is invalid request body', () => pm.expect(pm.response.json().error).to.eql('invalid request body'));
pm.test('Array has at least one reading', () => pm.expect(pm.response.json().length).to.be.greaterThan(0));
pm.test('All readings belong to the station', () => {
